codeReview.summary: Current branch state already satisfies the requested fix: the launched `src/server.ts` path builds the same app instance that registers `/metrics` and `/diagnostics/runtime`, existing coverage asserts both routes in-process, and the worker handoff includes credible live-server evidence that representative `/simple/price` and `/coins/markets` traffic changed the real metrics output after readiness. I found no code-level regression or missing behavior in the reviewed feature because no code change was required beyond verifying the live path no longer reproduces the earlier 404 report.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission shared runtime note about live `src/server.ts` serving 404 for `/metrics` and `/diagnostics/runtime` is now stale; the reviewed feature's handoff shows the current branch exposes both routes after readiness and the code path in `src/server.ts` still directly calls `buildApp()` from `src/app.ts`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/runtime.md states live 404s for `/metrics` and `/diagnostics/runtime`; `src/server.ts:1-24` uses `buildApp()` directly; `src/app.ts:97-109` registers diagnostics and metrics routes; `src/modules/diagnostics.ts:65-89` defines both endpoints; handoff `2026-03-26T11-59-57-112Z__live-metrics-route-runtime-path-fix__29181a63-bb4f-4470-98bc-27ee52db1623.json` records live 200 responses plus post-traffic metric counter changes.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and the live-route implementation.
